evals.prompt: I'm in a Turborepo monorepo and want Cloudflare-backed remote caching set up from scratch. Deploy whatever is needed and prove the second build is a remote cache hit.
evals.expected_output: Agent chooses the R2-first fast path, deploys or configures a Worker, avoids optional D1/KV until base cache works, runs real turbo remote:w then remote:r, reports cache hit and cleanup.

evals.prompt: Our Turboflare worker is already deployed but CI still misses cache. Debug onboarding and tell me exactly what to set in GitHub Actions.
evals.expected_output: Agent verifies TURBO_API/TURBO_TOKEN/TURBO_TEAM, checks /v8/artifacts/status, runs a real write/read smoke, reports exact Turbo output if remote caching is unavailable, and outputs CI env vars with secrets redacted.

evals.prompt: Set up advanced Turboflare auth for our team: revocable tokens and artifact metadata queries. Make sure it works remotely.
evals.expected_output: Agent first confirms base R2 remote cache works, then creates/binds D1 TOKEN_DB and ARTIFACT_INDEX, applies schemas, creates/revokes tokens, verifies index insert and cleanup, and reports source-of-truth boundaries.
